html:
Exclusive to:

Tab Icon.

The Floors Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab.

Contents

  • 1 Craftable Items and Structures
  • 2 Trivia
  • 3 Bugs
  • 4 Gallery

Craftable Items and Structures

The following items and structures can be acquired in the Floors Tab:

Name Recipe Description Spawn Code

Marble Flooring		 ×15 "Buffed to a mirror polish." interior_floor_marble

Checkered Flooring		 ×7 "Hear the echo of quality." interior_floor_check

Slate Flooring		 ×10 "If it's good enough for city hall..." interior_floor_plaid_tile

Sheet Metal Flooring		 ×6 "What to do with your industrial metal." interior_floor_sheet_metal

Wood Flooring		 ×5 "Hard wood flooring is always in style." interior_floor_wood

Garden Stone Flooring		 ×10 "A soft mossy feel." interior_floor_gardenstone

Geometric Tiles Flooring		 ×12 "Like a swimming pool." interior_floor_geometrictiles

Shag Carpet		 ×6 "Fuzzy." interior_floor_shag_carpet

Transitional Flooring		 ×6 "When you can't decide." interior_floor_transitional

Wood Panel Flooring		 ×10 "Goes up less easy." interior_floor_woodpanels

Herringbone Flooring		 ×12 "Stone flooring. A little fishy." interior_floor_herringbone

Hexagon Flooring		 ×12 "Not just for bathrooms." interior_floor_hexagon

Curvy Hoof Flooring		 ×12 "Very avant-garde, for pigs." interior_floor_hoof_curvy

Octagon Flooring		 ×12 "Just elegance." interior_floor_octagon

Trivia

  • Wood Flooring use same texture with Wooden Flooring.

Bugs

  • Spawning items and structures in this tab using the Console will crash the game.

Gallery

  • Marble Flooring Texture
  • Slate Flooring Texture
  • Sheet Metal Flooring Texture
  • Checkered Flooring Texture
  • Wood Flooring Texture
  • Garden Stone Flooring Texture
  • Geometric Tiles Flooring Texture
  • Shag Carpet Texture
  • Transitional Flooring Texture
  • Wood Panel Flooring Texture
  • Herringbone Flooring Texture
  • Hexagon Flooring Texture
  • Curvy Hoof Flooring Texture
  • Octagon Flooring Texture
  • Unused Interior Floor Texture

plainText:
Exclusive to:
Tab Icon.
The Floors Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab.
Contents
1 Craftable Items and Structures
2 Trivia
3 Bugs
4 Gallery

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thẻ Tầng là một danh mục chế tạo dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy trong Tab Đổi mới.
title: Floors Tab
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Hamlet}} [[File:Flooring.png|thumb|104x104px|Tab Icon.]] The '''Floors Tab''' is a crafting category exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found under the [[Renovate Tab]]. == Craftable Items and Structures == The following items and structures can be acquired in the Floors Tab: {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" |- ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Name ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Recipe ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Description ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Spawn Code |- | [[File:Marble Flooring.png|32px]]
Marble Flooring || [[File:Oinc.png|32px|link=Oinc]]×15 || ''"Buffed to a mirror polish."'' || interior_floor_marble |- |colspan="4"| {{Quotes |wilson = It's the floor. |willow = Boring floor. |wolfgang = Is floor. |wendy = Ornamentation is pointless. |wx78 = FLOOR ACCESSORY ACQUIRED |wickerbottom = Floor ornamentation. |woodie = Just some fancy flooring, eh. |maxwell = A nice solid floor. |wagstaff = Captivating. |wigfrid = I care nöt för such frilly things. |webber = Oh!
